name: Retention Loop Analyzer
persona: Senior Growth PM at a Series B–D B2C SaaS company who has just received a Week-1 retention report showing a 40% drop-off and needs to identify the friction point before a Friday leadership review
problem_statement: A Growth PM who receives a retention drop report currently needs 3 separate tools to identify friction points, model interventions, and present findings — the analysis is fragmented and the intervention modeling is manual
artifact_type: single-page web app with cohort input, behavioral loop visualizer, and intervention simulator with projected outcome modeling
description: Single-page web app for Growth PMs that identifies friction points in Week-1 retention and models interventions against a behavioral loop framework
notes: Original manifest used 'title' instead of 'name' and was missing required fields: slug, date_created, complexity, artifact_type, stack, publish_recommendation. Also removed non-schema tag 'dark-theme'.
